_comment: Edit ONLY this file to add/remove videos. Then run: npm run build:videos . Fields: url/urls, caption, description (EN), description_id (ID), ar, source. Categories also support blurb_id and title_id for Indonesian.

videos.caption: Expressive Talent
videos.description: Two POV skits for Meraki Agency, different scenes but the same sharp instinct — expressive timing and genuine reactions that sell every bit right to the punchline.
videos.description_id: Dua skit POV buat Meraki Agency — scene beda tapi instingnya sama tajamnya. Timing ekspresif dan reaksi yang natural ngejual setiap bit sampai ke punchline-nya.

videos.caption: Informative Talent
videos.description: Hosting for Botomotif across two different cars — keeping things clear and natural enough that it actually feels like a conversation, not a spec sheet.
videos.description_id: Host buat Botomotif di dua mobil berbeda — penyampaian yang clear dan natural bikin detail-detailnya gampang masuk dan enak diikutin, bukan kayak baca brosur.

videos.caption: Cinematic Framing
videos.description: Corporate profile shoot for PT Hisotex — deliberate lighting, movement, and framing that makes the brand feel premium on screen.
videos.description_id: Syuting profil korporat buat PT Hisotex — pencahayaan, gerakan, dan framing yang disengaja biar brand-nya keliatan premium di layar.

videos.caption: Subject Framing
videos.description: Automotive feature shoot — every frame composed so the car and talent both read clean and look polished right out of the camera.
videos.description_id: Syuting fitur otomotif — setiap frame dikomposisiin biar mobilnya dan talent-nya keliatan bersih dan polished langsung dari kamera.

categories.title: Short Form Edit
categories.blurb: Reels & shorts, built to hook fast

videos.caption: Aesthetic Typography
videos.description: Two Reels that lead with type — text movement locked to the audio so the rhythm hooks you before you even realize it.
videos.description_id: Dua Reels yang dipimpin tipografi — gerakan teks dikunci ke audio biar ritme-nya udah nge-hook sebelum kamu sadar.

videos.caption: Elegant Shoot + Edit
videos.description: Two pieces for Botomotif from shot to final cut — deliberate framing on set and a grade that makes each car look exactly as premium as it should.
videos.description_id: Dua project buat Botomotif dari syuting sampai cut final — framing yang niat di set dan grade yang bikin setiap mobil keliatan sepremium yang semestinya.

videos.caption: Edited for Big Creators
videos.description: Editing for Edward Halim — keeping a long YouTube video actually watchable the whole way through, so the views don't just come in, they stick.
videos.description_id: Edit buat Edward Halim — bikin video YouTube panjang tetap enak ditonton dari awal sampai akhir, biar viewsnya nggak cuma datang tapi juga betah.

videos.caption: Clean Vlog Edit
videos.description: Vlog edit for VIP Koocester Car Meet — clean cuts, relaxed pace, story that's easy to follow all the way through.
videos.description_id: Edit vlog VIP Koocester Car Meet — potongan bersih, pacing santai, cerita yang gampang diikutin dari awal sampai habis.
